Class UniversalisRestBuilder

java.lang.Object
de.chojo.universalis.rest.UniversalisRestBuilder
public class UniversalisRestBuilder extends Object
Class to build an universalis rest client

  • Method Details

    • setHttp

      @CheckReturnValue public UniversalisRestBuilder setHttp(HttpClient http)
      Set the http client used to send requests to universalis
      Parameters:
      http - client
      Returns:
      builder

    • setExecutorService

      @CheckReturnValue public UniversalisRestBuilder setExecutorService(ScheduledExecutorService executorService)
      Set the executor service used for asynchronous requests.
      Parameters:
      executorService - executor service
      Returns:
      builder

    • setItemNameSupplier

      @CheckReturnValue public UniversalisRestBuilder setItemNameSupplier(NameSupplier nameSupplier)
      Set the item name supplier. This is required to get item names on runtime. Use Items.create() to get a default implementation using a fallback file.
      Parameters:
      nameSupplier - name supplier
      Returns:
      builder

    • setBaseUri

      @CheckReturnValue public UniversalisRestBuilder setBaseUri(URI baseUri)
      Override the base URI of the universalis API. Defaults to DEFAULT_BASE_URI.
      Parameters:
      baseUri - base URI
      Returns:
      builder

    • build

      @CheckReturnValue public UniversalisRest build()
      Build the api. The instance is ready to use.
      Returns:
      api instance
